name: core-js
description: A modular JavaScript polyfill library that provides support for the latest ECMAScript features in older browsers. core-js is the most widely used polyfill solution, powering Babel's preset-env and used by millions of websites to ensure cross-browser compatibility.
advantages: Comprehensive coverage of ECMAScript features and proposals
Modular architecture allows selective polyfill loading
Automatically detects required polyfills when used with Babel
Supports modern JavaScript features like Promise, async/await, and Symbol
Regular updates to support the latest ECMAScript proposals
disadvantages: Adds bundle size overhead when not properly optimized
Can polyfill features even in modern browsers that already support them
Version 2 to 3 migration required significant changes
